title: Reading and Use of English – Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: I'm sure he didn't take your wallet.

questions.firstSentence: This painting was created in the seventeenth century.
They didn't go to the festival because it was too far.
She advised me not to trust him.
He no longer argues with his sister.
questions.explanation: Tests 'used to' or 'be/get used to' structures.

questions.firstSentence: Despite the high cost, they bought the house.
questions.explanation: Tests emphasis with 'even' or comparative structures.

questions.firstSentence: She started her degree three years ago.
questions.beforeGap: She has been studying for her degree
questions.explanation: Tests purpose or duration structures with 'for'.
